title: Smoky American Potato Bowl
description: A hearty, smoky potato bowl filled with tender beef and topped with a tangy slaw.
instructions: 2. Scrub and cube the potatoes, then toss with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Spread potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
4. In a large skillet, cook the beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking into small pieces as it cooks.
5. Add the onion, garlic, and smoky paprika to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
6. In a large bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, beef mixture, and cabbage.
7. In a separate bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise and apple cider vinegar to make the slaw dressing.
8. Toss the cabbage with the slaw dressing until well coated.
9. To assemble the bowls, divide the potato-beef mixture among four bowls, then top each with a spoonful of slaw.
10. Serve immediately, garnished with sweet corn kernels if desired.
